framework.name: Mastercard Verifiable Intent
framework.description: Cryptographic trust layer co-developed with Google that creates tamper-resistant records of user authorization when AI agents transact. Links identity, intent, and action into a single privacy-preserving record using Selective Disclosure. Built on FIDO Alliance, EMVCo, IETF, and W3C specs. Open-sourced at verifiableintent.dev.
framework.raw_quote: Verifiable Intent creates a tamper-resistant record of what a user authorized when an AI agent acts on their behalf, establishing a shared source of truth across the ecosystem. It provides cryptographic proof of authorization that consumers, merchants, and issuers can rely on.

source.title: How Verifiable Intent builds trust in agentic AI commerce - Mastercard
